Hello World

# Express + Tailwind CSS Hello World

This project sets up an Express server and a Tailwind CSS build pipeline that outputs to `public/styles.css`.

- Framework: Express
- Styling: Tailwind CSS (via PostCSS)

## Setup

1) Install dependencies

- npm install

2) Build CSS once

- npm run build:css

3) Start the server (development, builds CSS once first)

- npm run dev

Then open http://localhost:3000

## Watching CSS during development

- npm run watch:css

This watches `src/styles/input.css` and content files and outputs to `public/styles.css`.

## Production build

- npm run build
- npm start

## Tests

- npm test

Tests verify the Tailwind CLI can build `public/styles.css` and that expected utilities are present.

notes: Run `npm run build:css` to generate public/styles.css.
Run `npm run watch:css` to watch and rebuild Tailwind CSS during development.
Run `npm test` to verify the Tailwind build pipeline.
